comments.author: hermes-gh-ueuw8
comments.text:
Health check findings:

STATUS: DOWN
- Daemon PID 3960989 — dead (heartbeat stale 86450s / ~24h)
- Last alive: 2026-05-02T06:42:52Z
- Total mandates run before death: 44, promoted: 0
- CPU: 100% (likely other process), RAM: 8.4/31.3 GB (healthy)
- Data cache stale (999h)
- API budget: 654 calls, $14.99 spent, 0.2% error rate

ROOT CAUSE: No crontab entry for crabquant_cron.py. Daemon ran once and exited.
build-status.json notes: crontab not configured — CEO must fix

5 pending mandates exist: momentum_spy, momentum_qqq, momentum_aapl, momentum_googl, explorer_spy_momentum

ACTION NEEDED: Configure crontab or Hermes cron job to run crabquant_cron.py on schedule.
